description: Update all 5 lead capture forms to call the new submitLeadCapture utility on submission (in addition to existing localStorage logic). Each form passes its unique formSource identifier and any relevant context.
steps: Update components/lead-capture/NewsletterInlineForm.tsx: In handleSubmit, after the existing console.log and markLeadCaptured() calls, import and call submitLeadCapture({ email, name, formSource: 'costsmart-newsletter-form', pageUrl: window.location.href }). Keep existing UX unchanged - the API call is fire-and-forget and does not gate the success state.

Update components/lead-capture/ExitIntentPopup.tsx: In handleSubmit, after console.log and markLeadCaptured(), call submitLeadCapture({ email, name, formSource: 'costsmart-exit-intent-form', pageUrl: window.location.href }).

Update components/lead-capture/FloatingBottomBar.tsx: In handleSubmit, after console.log and markLeadCaptured(), call submitLeadCapture({ email, formSource: 'costsmart-bottombar-form', pageUrl: window.location.href }). Note: this form has no name field.

Update components/lead-capture/CalculatorResultGate.tsx: In handleSubmit, after console.log and markLeadCaptured(), call submitLeadCapture({ email, name, formSource: 'costsmart-calculator-gate-form', pageUrl: window.location.href, calculatorContext: { calculatorName: 'SIP Calculator', resultSummary: 'Calculator result gate submission' } }). The calculatorContext provides extra context for Zapier to trigger personalized follow-ups.

Update components/lead-capture/BlogSidebarForm.tsx: In handleSubmit, after console.log and markLeadCaptured(), call submitLeadCapture({ email, formSource: 'costsmart-blog-sidebar-form', pageUrl: window.location.href }). Note: this form has no name field.
acceptance_criteria: All 5 form components import submitLeadCapture from '@/lib/lead-capture-api'
All 5 form components call submitLeadCapture in their handleSubmit with appropriate formSource
The existing UX flow (success states, markLeadCaptured, console.log) remains unchanged
No form blocks on the API response - all submissions are fire-and-forget
verification: Run pnpm build and confirm no TypeScript or build errors
Run pnpm lint and confirm no linting errors
